source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder has 0.5 kg of air at 2000 kPa, 1000 K. The cylinder has stops, so Vmin =0.03 m^3. The air now cools to 400 K by heat transfer to the ambient. Find the heat transfer.
